summary: Rev 1 plan review (non-authoring). Correctness claims all independently verified and HELD (7 identity sites verbatim; 3 shipped docs carry v0.1; dmc-agents-md refuse-overwrite :493 + mktemp-hermetic selftest :584, no repo-AGENTS.md byte pin; composer reads no checklist, SUB_GATES frozen at 9, 39/0; release-readiness.schema.md:118-121 is the M9-reserved bullet and NOT mirror-pinned (mirror set = plan/run/verification only); harness-matrix.json self-tags M10; CI count exact: 15 blocking = 13 substantive + 2 porcelain, 1 advisory replay at :191). NEEDS_CLARIFICATION on two surgical blockers: BL1 the primary product-identity acceptance grep is malformed (ERE with escaped pipes = literal-pipe alternation, vacuously EMPTY before AND after edits — false-confidence PASS; corrected form also over-matches the KEEP-archival pilot report); BL2 completeness claim falsified — docs/NOTION_EXPORT_SUMMARY.md:13 'Do-Me-Coding v0.1 is a Claude Code Native Pack first.' is a live product-identity claim not in Allowed-to-Edit nor in any exclusion allowlist. The two interact: the broken grep would mask the NOTION omission. Both fixable without redesign.

criteria_checked.note: NOTION_EXPORT_SUMMARY.md:13 unaddressed; 'gap CLOSED by 3 shipped docs' falsified by independent grep
escaped-pipe ERE matches nothing (vacuous EMPTY); corrected pattern over-matches archival DMC_REAL_REPO_PILOT_REPORT.md:1 v0.1.2
audit :266-290 confirmed; B6 M10-closed; B8 by-design NO-ACTION; T016.4 well-specified
write-once mint, gate-before-commit, FLAG-never-fails, staged=scope.lock all correctly handled in T016.6
grep covers 4 of 7 FORBIDDEN_CODEX_LEXEMES (dmc-doctor.py:86 adds active/guaranteed/runtime-enforced)
composer/mirror-55/802-3-3 untouched; INSTALL_MANIFEST already v1.0, content-independent
prose-only, composer-blind, not mirror-pinned — sound but must cite/distinguish the precedent (:91,:239); verifier confirms no normative delta

blockers.statement: Verification Commands row 2 (primary product-identity acceptance grep) is malformed: grep -rInE with escaped pipes treats them as LITERAL, matching nothing — vacuous EMPTY regardless of content (verified exit 1 as written; unescaped form returns 8+ live sites). A false-confidence PASS on the milestone's central acceptance bar.
blockers.suggested_fix: Rewrite as valid ERE (or multiple -e patterns, pipe-free for markdown-table safety), anchor to avoid v0.1.x archival over-match, and prove NON-empty pre-edit / EMPTY post-edit.

blockers.statement: docs/NOTION_EXPORT_SUMMARY.md:13 'Do-Me-Coding v0.1 is a Claude Code Native Pack first.' is a live product-identity claim outside Allowed-to-Edit and outside any documented exclusion allowlist; the corrected grep also over-matches the KEEP-archival DMC_REAL_REPO_PILOT_REPORT.md:1 (v0.1.2). The plan's 'zero unexplained hits' acceptance cannot be met as scoped.
blockers.suggested_fix: Add NOTION_EXPORT_SUMMARY.md to T016.1 scope AND enumerate the archival exclusion allowlist (_DMC_* scaffold titles, DMC_REAL_REPO_PILOT_REPORT.md v0.1.2, MILESTONES historical entries, COMPETITIVE_GAP_LEDGER) with per-file rationale in M10 evidence.

advisories.statement: Codex-line honesty grep covers 4 of 7 doctor FORBIDDEN_CODEX_LEXEMES; expand to all 7 (+active/guaranteed/runtime-enforced, word-boundary) and optionally assert CODEX_REQUIRED_SUBSTRINGS (ADVISORY, pre-commit/CI).
'dmc validate' has no release-readiness mode (plan|run|verification only); readiness conformance is checked inside the composer — reword the acceptance method.
AGENTS.md acceptance is conditional on the regen GATE-DECISION: hand-edit branch leaves --validate REFUSED (bespoke doc); state the two-branch acceptance explicitly.

release-readiness.schema.md edit runs against the audit-remediation 'no schema contract edit' not-edit precedent (:91,:239); add a one-line reconciliation + verifier confirms no normative field/enum/SUB_GATES delta.

Stale self-referential counts: 'exactly 2 hits' for DMC-T016 (now more, no-collision substance holds); MILESTONES 'ends at v0.6.1-v0.6.5' imprecise (a decomposed-not-built v0.6.6-v0.6.9 section + stale Next pointer follow).
